recommendations.title: Tell Me Who I Am
recommendations.overview: In this documentary, Alex trusts his twin, Marcus, to tell him about his past after he loses his memory. But Marcus is hiding a dark family secret.

recommendations.title: Surveillance
recommendations.overview: An FBI agent tracks a serial killer with the help of three of his would-be victims - all of whom have wildly different stories to tell.

recommendations.title: It Follows
recommendations.overview: A young woman is followed by an unknown supernatural force after a sexual encounter.

recommendations.title: Unknown
recommendations.overview: Five men wake up in a locked-down warehouse with no memory of who they are. They are forced to figure out who is good and who is bad to stay alive.

recommendations.title: Eyes Wide Shut
recommendations.overview: After Dr. Bill Harford's wife, Alice, admits to having sexual fantasies about a man she met, Bill becomes obsessed with having a sexual encounter. He discovers an underground sexual group and attends one of their meetings -- and quickly discovers tha

recommendations.title: Disappearance at Clifton Hill
recommendations.overview: Following the death of her mother, a young woman returns home to Niagara Falls and becomes entangled in the memory of a kidnapping she claims to have witnessed as a child.

recommendations.title: The Pariah
recommendations.overview: For more than 15 years, two Marseille friends and criminals battle the law, rival gangs, prison authorities and even mined beaches in order to survive.

recommendations.title: From Beginning to End
recommendations.overview: Two brothers develop a very close relationship as they are growing up in an idyllic and happy family. When they are young adults their relationship becomes very intimate, romantic, and sexual.

recommendations.title: Caveat
recommendations.overview: A lone drifter suffering from partial memory loss accepts a job to look after a psychologically troubled woman in an abandoned house on an isolated island.

recommendations.title: Secretary
recommendations.overview: A young woman, recently released from a mental hospital, gets a job as a secretary to a demanding lawyer, where their employer-employee relationship turns into a sexual, sadomasochistic one.
